site.description: A dashboard for exploring open parliamentary data.
home.title: Clear, visual parliamentary activity
home.description: Browse the latest votes, initiatives and speeches from Congress, focused on the current term with access to the full history.
congress.listDescription: Complete list generated from public indexes, sorted by most recent activity date.
congress.noDescription: No description is available in the data index.
congress.completeDataDescription: Full contents of the record and its associated public API file.
congress.vote.label: Vote
congress.vote.unmapped: Votes not located in the hemicycle
congress.vote.noDeputies: No named member list is available for this vote.
congress.search.label: Search votes
congress.search.placeholder: Search by title, subtitle, term or identifier
congress.search.hint: Use the search box to filter all votes from the term.
congress.empty.title: No records yet
congress.empty.section: The public API does not contain records for this section right now.
congress.sections.votesDescription: Results, totals and individual votes from available sessions.
congress.sections.initiativesDescription: Parliamentary initiative datasets published as open data.
congress.sections.speechesDescription: Speeches found by the crawler when the public source exposes them.
congress.deputies.title: Members
congress.deputies.description: Browse each member's vote history, participation and behavior across the available votes.
congress.deputies.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or parliamentary group
congress.deputies.searchHint: Use the search box to filter the member list.
congress.deputy.description: Vote history and personal statistics for this member.
congress.legislature.description: Aggregated vote, group and member summary for the selected term.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
